text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Finally done with today's training. I'm
starving!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that Biko running over there?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Ah! Bono! Did you just finish practice?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I have a little left to go! I'm also doing a patrol of
the campus while I run!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The shadows of evil lurk everywhere... but worry
not! For I am here to safeguard the peace of the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Biko... That's so buono! ☆ Could I join you on
your patrol?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It'd be better to have two people in case a villain
actually appears, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The school's safe, but I understand why she's
concerned about a younger student wandering
alone in the dark. I worry she might wear herself
out if she tags along, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The school's safe, but I understand why she's
concerned about a younger student wandering
alone in the dark. I worry she might wear herself
out if she tags along, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Hishi Akebono gets in some extra solo
training by jogging around the school on patrol.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see... It might affect my performance
tomorrow if I run any more today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, Trainer! I'm counting on you to help
maintain school peace! Good luck!
